creator: simon.wright@gmx.net
text:
Update fixes security issue detailed in SA-CORE-2012-004, https://
drupal.org/SA-CORE-2012-004

Fix: Index: Makefile
===================================================================
--- Makefile    (revision 339034)
+++ Makefile    (working copy)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=      drupal6
-PORTVERSION=   6.28
+PORTVERSION=   6.29
 CATEGORIES=    www
 MASTER_SITES=  http://ftp.drupal.org/files/projects/
 DISTNAME=      drupal-${PORTVERSION}
Index: distinfo
===================================================================
--- distinfo    (revision 339034)
+++ distinfo    (working copy)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (drupal/drupal-6.28.tar.gz) = 0f92b1863860535877d3a4547dd1481d0fbc76959cc7042d6c4b2b81209a987f
-SIZE (drupal/drupal-6.28.tar.gz) = 1105942
+SHA256 (drupal/drupal-6.29.tar.gz) = 49c17082e78ecd37eb218812d3e4d679b61ec24297c5ee079a206cdc6f45b2db 
+SIZE (drupal/drupal-6.29.tar.gz) = 1101032

Patch attached with submission follows:
